# Databricks Documentation

- [Machine readable copy of the REST API reference](https://docs.databricks.com/api/llms.txt) - Complete API catalog.
- [REST API](https://docs.databricks.com/api/workspace/introduction) - REST API reference application.

## Core platform

- [Delta Lake](https://docs.databricks.com/delta/) - Delta Lake concepts and guidance.
- [Compute](https://docs.databricks.com/compute/) - Compute concepts and guidance.
- [Delta Lake duplicate](https://docs.databricks.com/delta/#overview) - Duplicate pages are ignored.

## Data engineering

- [Lakeflow Jobs](https://docs.databricks.com/jobs/) - Orchestrate data workflows with jobs.
- [Auto Loader](https://docs.databricks.com/ingestion/cloud-object-storage/auto-loader/) - Incrementally ingest cloud files.

## Future official topic

- [Future feature](https://docs.databricks.com/future/) - A future official topic is still indexed.

## Additional resources

- [Pricing](https://www.databricks.com/product/pricing) - External resources are links only.
- [Databricks Academy](https://www.databricks.com/learn/training/home) - Databricks training information.
